title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta discusses production evaluation approaches for autonomous AI agents that go beyond offline benchmarks. The talk covers continuous evaluation pipelines, online vs offline evaluation architectures, human-in-the-loop systems, and methods for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs presents production evaluation methods for autonomous AI agents, moving past offline benchmarks toward continuous assessment of live systems. The talk contrasts online and offline evaluation architectures, covers continuous evaluation pipelines, and details human-in-the-loop review for agentic workflows. It addresses detecting drift and hallucinations at scale, with attention to tool use, structured workflows, and observability. The focus is on evaluating agents as they run in production rather than only before deployment.
